_doc: PROVISIONAL Stage-2 MusicPile post-training config (measure L_im). Fixed IDENTICALLY across every lambda. Consumed by StageConfig.from_json.
_provenance_detail: Table 7 (EXPLICIT_PAPER) gives the 135M Stage-2 search space: LR in {1e-4,2e-4,5e-4,1e-3,5e-3}, min LR 5e-5, warmup 500 (fixed), WD 0.1 (fixed), global batch in {192,480,896}, dropout 0.0. The single (LR,dropout,batch) triple used FOR Fig 3a is UNKNOWN (needs official code). Provisional pick = LR 5e-4, dropout 0.0, global batch 480, max 2B tokens with early stopping. To be FINALIZED via a lambda=0-only preregistered pilot BEFORE the lambda grid, then frozen and applied identically to all conditions (DECISIONS.md).
_early_stop_note: Validation-based early stopping on MusicPile val loss; patience = consecutive evals without >= early_stop_min_delta improvement. Restore best-val checkpoint for Stage 3. Uses ONLY the preregistered val criterion (never C4/ChemPile diagnostics).
